description: Kit manifest: external packs (skills/agents/personas), machine presets (MCP). kit.py generate reads skills.*; kit.py setup applies mcp.* to the local machine.

sources.notes: Each SKILL.md under import_roots is copied to skills/{prefix}-{path-with-dashes}/. Conflicts with first-party dirs (no .skill-source.yaml) abort unless --force.

cursor.notes: Written by `kit.py setup`. Per-project overrides stay in <repo>/.cursor/mcp.json. Use env placeholders for secrets (see rules/200-security-mcp.mdc).
